main.bio: My name is Joyal. Currently, I'm doing a Bachelor of Engineering at L.J. Institute of Engineering & Technology affiliated with Gujarat Technological University (GTU). || Optimistic, Proactive, Quick-learner, and seeking opportunities to learn new Tools & Technologies. The one who didn't get away!

testimonials.text: Here I write some nice things that someone has said about me..
Joyal is absolutely excellent, his depth of knowledge & his mentorship really meant a lot to us... I would definitely recommend.
Learning with Joyal has been AWESOME, he makes learning React so easy and approachable, you'll finally feel like you know what's going on!
